description: PAGE FOUR The East Hartford Gazette The East Haitiord Gazette is published by the West Hartford Publishing Company Bice Clemow President Established tn 1884 by Henry B Hale the Gazette is published every Thursday at 1128 Main Street East Hartford Connecti cut Entered as second class matter at the Post Office in Hartford on December 2 1942 undei the Act of March 3 1879 Second class postage paid at Hartford Conn John G Rohrbach Publisher Richard A Woodley Managing Editor Al Fedu Photographer All news contributions and communications should be addressed to the East Hartford Gazette 1128 Main Street East Hartford Telephone JAckson 82194 Subscription Rates 400 per year 650 for two years 850 sot three years Servicemen and Teachers 300 per year College Subscriptions 300 for ten montns THURSDAY JULY 13 1961 How to pick a winner The local Jaycees have done it again Somehow or other their Miss East Hartford has now been named Miss Connecticut no small feat Last week the Gazettes editor took a nice kind of Fourth of July assignment for himself and presented our candidate for Miss America to her now adopted hometown Miss Karen Scalise we suppose really deserves all this applause and
